actionable_feedback: Reconcile grader metadata so top-level fields and nested raw outputs are consistent. Specifically populate or align top-level semantic_score, model, and any deterministic_precheck_ref with the values in raw_model_output/raw_llm_output, or clearly document which nested fields are authoritative.

Fix deterministic_precheck_ref inconsistencies: ensure the deterministic_precheck object and the top-level deterministic_precheck_ref (if present) reference the same deterministic precheck artifact or are both absent.

In the memo and CSV, explicitly state the canonical interpretation of '+4 pts' (e.g., '+4 vol points = +0.04 absolute vol') if that is intended; if another unit is canonical, use that and update calculations accordingly to remove 'needs_review'.

Decide and document theta treatment: either (a) provide a holding-period/horizon to convert theta into a PnL contribution or (b) explicitly declare theta out-of-scope in the packet/memo so it remains marked 'needs_review' intentionally.
After applying metadata fixes and clarifications to memo/CSV, re-run the verifier to ensure no remaining internal consistency issues appear.
